title: Whose Hand is this in episode 1
display_title: Whose Hand is this in episode 1
wikitext:
[]: Whose Hand is this? (in episode 1)             Quote Post by Nephilim » Fri Jul 23, 2004 8:42 pm In episode 1, when Shinji enters the Nerv Headquarters for the first time, going to see the Eva-01, we can see a giant hand. When we see it we asume that is the Eva-01 hand, but then we see that the arms are in the wall. And in the manga we can see the same thing, Shinji, Misato and Ritsuko going in the boat, passing the giant hand, and then arriving to the arm of the Eva-01. WHOSE HAND IS THAT? :shock:

[]:             Quote Post by DatDude » Fri Jul 23, 2004 8:51 pm Umm it has to bee ether eva unit-00 or mabe one of the test boddies they use later in the show?

[]:             Quote Post by Asuka Langley » Fri Jul 23, 2004 9:03 pm Ya, I think that's Unit-00 from it's first activation test when it went berserk and started beating the wall. I guess one of its hands went thru.

[]:             Quote Post by Kiel » Fri Jul 23, 2004 9:24 pm Well, I didn't want to let this get out, but... that hand...belongs... ...to me. I know, I know, they always said in Phys-Ed that steriods were bad, but y'know.

[]:             Quote Post by Dave » Fri Jul 23, 2004 9:47 pm Bad Kiel. Bad! I don't remember seeing Unit 01's handing sticking through the wall when it was shown in episode two.

[]: good point.             Quote Post by Olin of Xephon » Fri Jul 23, 2004 10:11 pm You got that right Dave. Eva unit-00's right hand is curled into a fist and smashed into the glass, but there is no sign of the pink liquid that fills the tank The Hand seems to be pressed against. And besides, wouldn't Eva-unit00's test box be kinda out of the way since they where heading for the holding cages? It might have been one of those test bodies, but maybe it was some kind of Neon mural/screen? Remeber the big screen in the Bath (in episode 24) which alternates between a peacfeul shot of a mountain and a seizure inducing still of the NERV logo? Of course I guess we can all rest easy now that we know it was Kiel's hand.

[]:             Quote Post by Nephilim » Fri Jul 23, 2004 10:35 pm Well, i've never thought about Eva-00, because i thought that his fist was smashing the window where gendo was. But right now i rewatched the episode, and the Eva 00 after smashing the window, explels the Entry plug and then turns to the left and smashes the left wiall, traspassing the wall right before it went out off power. And i asume that after the eva went out of power his hand relaxed and opened a little bit. Here i have the screen-caps: MISTERY SOLVE !!! :P

[]:             Quote Post by Dave » Fri Jul 23, 2004 10:39 pm Isn't that a screenshot from the second time Unit 00 went berserk (after Shinji attempted to pilot it)?

[]:             Quote Post by Nephilim » Fri Jul 23, 2004 10:44 pm Dave wrote: Isn't that a screenshot from the second time Unit 00 went berserk (after Shinji attempted to pilot it)?

[]:             Quote Post by Quiddity » Fri Jul 23, 2004 10:45 pm Dave wrote: Isn't that a screenshot from the second time Unit 00 went berserk (after Shinji attempted to pilot it)?

[]:             Quote Post by Nephilim » Fri Jul 23, 2004 10:47 pm Quiddity wrote: I think its a blooper, plain and simple. Just like the plugsuit in the entry plug in episode 20, the animators screwed up.

[]:             Quote Post by Dave » Fri Jul 23, 2004 10:53 pm It is the hand of god, welcoming the new Messiah: Shinji Ikari. Is the destiny of man controlled by some transcendental law or will? Is it like the hand of god hovering up above? At least this much is true, that man has no control, even over his own will.

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Fri Jul 23, 2004 11:15 pm I would assume its the hand of Unit 00. There's not much else it could be.

[]:             Quote Post by aranami » Sat Jul 24, 2004 12:10 am in episode 5 the Unit-00 did punch the wall and eventualy break through the wall. While it was punching the wall both hands fists. When Unit-00 stoped moving the left hand stayed in a fist, so it is safe to assume(if you can do that with anything in Eva :) ) that the right hand did also. I think it must have been some sort of picture. If it was one of the eva's arms I'm sure it would have caught Shinji's attention.

[]:             Quote Post by Hexon.Arq » Sat Jul 24, 2004 2:28 am If it's a blooper, then why they made it again in the manga???

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Sat Jul 24, 2004 5:56 am I'd like to point out that the manga scan is from the flipped version of the English manga, so the original looks just like the anime. Also, for those that have seen the Renewal version, you will know that its much cleaner and clearer, and you can see more of the hand and the wall its coming out of. In the screenshot, you can't tell, but it actually looks about the same as the manga illustration. Only the color and quality of the original masters are too bad to make it out.

[]:             Quote Post by sadsadshinji » Sat Jul 24, 2004 11:22 am looked like a mural to me...i would think that if the hand had relaxed it would have been limp and stuff...then again, everythign is hazy...could the test tank have been filled with coolant?

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Sat Jul 24, 2004 1:18 pm I think this is just an artistic thing, it's obviously the right hand of Unit 00. It should be a closed fist, but it looks cooler and more dynamic with the hand open. And, it IS a cartoon guys. Brain farts do occur.

[]:             Quote Post by MongolSquad » Sat Jul 24, 2004 1:42 pm Well when I first watched Eva, I got the impression it belonged to Eva-01 seeing that Eva-00 was locked away. Annnnnd Eva-01 was in the pink restraint liquid and the hand has some sort of pink film over it. That's my opinion and it could have some symbolic reason like it was "reaching out" for Shinji. Kinda giving an early hint of Eva-01's bond with Shinji seeing that we later found out it was his mother's soul in it.

[]:             Quote Post by Jason » Sat Jul 24, 2004 8:50 pm yeah I always had the same thought. When I saw it in the anime I figured they were going around the bottom side of the giant holding tank for 01. Then when I read the manga I thought it was the hand through the wall of 00. I never even figured it was the same scene until I watched the animes again. Yeah I'm a little slow like that :roll:
